summary: Parallel review: FAIL (3 critical, 1 warning, 3 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: - `npm test` → `tests 590 / pass 590 / fail 0`; new suite "build-verify verdict — any 🔴 from any role causes FAIL" runs 8 cases, all green.

Evidence: Ran `node --test test/flows.test.mjs` — 47/47 pass. The new describe block at `test/flows.test.mjs:327-366` iterates all 6 `PARALLEL_REVIEW_ROLES`, asserting a single 🔴 from each role yields `FAIL`, multi-role 🔴 yields `FAIL` with correct count, and zero-critical yields `PASS`. Scope-disciplined (test-only), spec is fully verifiable from acceptance criteria, locks in the contract.
(No 🔴 or 🟡 — task is correctly tested. Process nit: no `artifacts/test-output.txt` was written for task-3, but it's reproducible from the test command.)
